name: Beef-Barley Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 10-inch nonstick skillet with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Cook beef and onion in the skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until beef is brown. Drain excess fat.
4. Mix the cooked beef mixture and remaining ingredients (except frozen vegetables) in a 3-quart casserole dish.
5. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in the frozen vegetables. Cover and bake for an additional 30 to 40 minutes, or until barley is tender.
Serves 6
